title: More Crafter Variants
description: Crafters for every kind of wood
body: [![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/badges/label/lieon-studios-creation.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieonstudios) [![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/badges/label/requires/quad.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad) Community: [![discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/discord.svg)](https://discord.lieonlion.dev/) Source: [![github](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/github.svg)](https://github.com/pnk2u/More-Crafter-Variants) pnku: [![pnku.de](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/icon/pnku_de_logo.svg)](https://www.pnku.de) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku) [![curseforge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pnku/) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_top.svg) **Note**: Recommended to be used with [More Crafting Tables](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-crafting-tables-lieonlion). ## More Crafter Variants ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Crafter-Variants/pres/mr_desc_banner_indexed.png) If _Crafting Tables_ can be colourful, then so can _Crafters_! Allowing for more customization in your automations. ### Adding 11 new _Crafters_ to Minecraft. --- ![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/kihcq.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_bottom.svg) [**![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/x68ez.gif)**]()
